raw_consumer_statement:
In early XXXX, I filed an official complaint through your office because I was unable to get Citibank to address the issue directly. Citibank issued XXXX replacement cards, and every time a new card was sent, XXXX XXXX became activated on my account- despite the fact that I do not use XXXX XXXX, have never activated it, and charges continued to appear that I did not authorize. 
I waited to activate the fourth replacement card until I heard back from you. Citibank informed me that the matter had been resolved, but today XXXX XXXX was activated once again without my permission. The newest card has already been shut down and yet another replacement is being issued, but at this point I feel like I'm going in circles without a true resolution. 
I am requesting a clear and permanent fix so that my card information is not forwarded to XXXX XXXX or any digital wallet going forward. 
Thank you for your assistance.
